zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily De Beaufoy於1344年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾福爾馬可時，她的父親Robert De Beaufoy35歲，母親Margaret Franceis24歲。她於大約1359年與Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1389年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾梅爾布恩享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily De Beaufoy于1344年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾福爾馬可时，她的父亲Robert De Beaufoy35岁，母亲Margaret Franceis24岁。她于大约1359年与Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1389年在英国英格兰德比夏爾梅爾布恩享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaufoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name in the case of the Domesday Book tenants from Beaufour (Calvados), which is recorded as Belfou, Beaufou in 1100 and as Bellefai in about 1160 ( Tengvik ).

variants.name: Domesday Book
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Bern, Barn. In the Midlands and East Anglia this is based on the Scandinavian personal name Biǫrn, anglicized as Beorn; in the south-west it is from Old English Beorn; both names are from a word meaning ‘warrior’. Some of the following surname bearers may alternatively belong with other senses below.

2 English: status name from Middle English barn (Old Scandinavian barn) ‘child’. This term is found in Domesday Book as a byname for men of the upper classes; it might also have had the meaning ‘young man of a prominent family’, like Middle English child ( see Child ).

3 English: locative name, nickname for residence near or employment at a barn, Middle English bern (Old English bere-ærn). See also Barnes . Some of the post-medieval bearers may alternatively belong with (1) or (2).

variants.name: Tengvik
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Eschalles in Pas-de-Calais (see   Tengvik  , p. 87).

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily De Beaufoy was born in 1344, in Foremark, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert De Beaufoy, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Franceis, was 24. She married Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV about 1359, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1389, in Melbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily De Beaufoy est née en 1344, à Foremark, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert De Beaufoy, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Franceis, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV environ 1359, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1389, à Melbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily De Beaufoy 1344 in Foremark, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert De Beaufoy 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Franceis 24. Sie hat um 1359 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1389 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Melbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily De Beaufoy è nata il nel 1344 nel Foremark, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert De Beaufoy, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Franceis, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV circa 1359, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1389, nel Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily De Beaufoyが1344年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアフォーエマークで生まれた時，父Robert De Beaufoyは35歳，母Margaret Franceisは24歳であった。約1359年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでSir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1389年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアメルボウルンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily De Beaufoy(이)가 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 포렘아르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert De Beaufoy(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Franceis(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 멜보우른에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily De Beaufoy nasceu em 1344, em Foremark, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert De Beaufoy, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Franceis, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV aproximadamente 1359, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1389, em Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily De Beaufoy родилась в 1344 г. в местности форемарк, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert De Beaufoy было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Franceis, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV около 1359 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1389 г. в местности мелбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily De Beaufoy nació en 1344, en Foremark, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert De Beaufoy, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Franceis, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV aproximadamente 1359, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1389, en Melbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
